title: Seizure and condemnation of unregistered products
doc_html:
§823.  Seizure and condemnation of unregistered products

Any product which has not been registered with the department as required by this Subpart is liable to seizure and condemnation by the department.  

Amended by Acts 1978, No. 786, §5, eff. July 17, 1978.
doc_text:
§823.  Seizure and condemnation of unregistered products
Any product which has not been registered with the department as required by this Subpart is liable to seizure and condemnation by the department.
Amended by Acts 1978, No. 786, §5, eff. July 17, 1978.
